home.title: A premium operating home for oils, dates, real estate, and trade services.

home.valuesTitle: Built for trust, scale, and daily operations
home.contactTitle: Ready to work with Abu Qasaa?
home.contactBody: Send a business inquiry and the right team can follow up from the dashboard.

dashboard.title: Command center

dashboard.superAdminAccess: Super Admin can access all business units.

public.businessUnitsBody: Explore the active businesses managed by Abnaa Abu Qasaa Trading.
